Some people may withdraw from friends and family, while others may seek comfort from them. Dealing with grief is difficult and not … Read more

title: Unleashing the Power of Team Building Activities for Employee Success
content:
Team building activities play a vital role in promoting a positive work environment and improving the overall success of a company. Whether it’s improving communication, boosting morale, or fostering collaboration, team-building activities have a wide range of benefits for employees. 

The objective of this blog is to provide an overview of the importance of team building activities and the different types of activities that can be used to enhance employee relationships, improve skills, and build a strong, cohesive team. We’ll cover everything from icebreaker activities to outdoor activities and beyond, and provide examples and benefits of each type of activity. 

By the end of this blog, you’ll have a better understanding of why team building activities are important and how you can incorporate them into your workplace to promote a positive and productive work environment.

Table of Contents

Toggle

• Importance of Team Building Activities for Employees
• Overview of the Activities Discussed
• Icebreaker Activities
• Description of Icebreaker Activities
• Examples of Icebreaker Activities:
• Benefits of Icebreaker Activities

• Outdoor Activities
• Description of Outdoor Activities
• Examples of Outdoor Activities
• Benefits of Outdoor Activities

• Indoor Activities
• Description of Indoor Activities
• Examples of Indoor Activities
• Benefits of Indoor Activities

• Problem-solving Activities
• Description of Problem-Solving Activities:
• Examples of Problem-Solving Activities:
• Benefits of Problem-Solving Activities:

• Creative Activities
• Description of Creative Activities:
• Examples of Creative Activities:
• Benefits of Creative Activities:

• Summary

## Importance of Team Building Activities for Employees

Team building activities are an essential aspect of workplace culture as they help to foster strong relationships and improve overall morale among employees. These activities are designed to bring employees together and help them to work more cohesively as a team. By participating in team building activities, employees have the opportunity to build trust, communication skills, and teamwork. This leads to increased productivity, motivation, and job satisfaction among employees. Additionally, team building activities can help to reduce stress and promote a positive work-life balance.

## Overview of the Activities Discussed

In this blog, we will discuss various types of team building activities, including icebreaker activities, outdoor activities, indoor activities, problem-solving activities, and creative activities. Each section will provide a description of the activity, examples, and the benefits of participating in the activity. This blog aims to provide a comprehensive overview of the different types of team building activities, making it easier for organizations to choose the right activity for their employees. Whether it’s for a new team, an established team, or simply a team that needs to improve their relationships, this blog will provide valuable insights and ideas for a successful team building experience.

## Icebreaker Activities

## Description of Icebreaker Activities

Icebreaker activities are designed to help employees get to know each other better, build trust, and improve communication. These activities are typically light-hearted and fun, and they help to break down barriers and create a more relaxed and friendly atmosphere within the workplace. Icebreaker activities can be used to introduce new employees to the team or to simply bring the team together for a fun and engaging activity.

## Examples of Icebreaker Activities:

Two Truths and a Lie: Each person in the group shares three statements about themselves, two of which are true and one is a lie. The rest of the group must guess which statement is the lie.

Trivia Game: Teams compete against each other to answer trivia questions in various categories such as history, geography, and pop culture.

Speed Networking: Employees are paired up with someone they haven’t met before and have a set amount of time to introduce themselves and ask each other questions.

Human Bingo: Participants fill out a bingo card with personal facts, hobbies, and interests. The first person to get five in a row wins.

## Benefits of Icebreaker Activities

Improved Communication: Icebreaker activities can help employees to get to know each other better and improve their communication skills.

Increased Trust: By participating in icebreaker activities, employees can build trust and form stronger relationships with each other.

Enhanced Collaboration: Icebreaker activities can help employees to work more cohesively as a team and improve collaboration among team members.

Breaking Down Barriers: These activities can help to break down any barriers or tension within the team, leading to a more positive and relaxed work environment.

Boosted Morale: Icebreaker activities are often light-hearted and fun, and they can help to improve overall morale and job satisfaction among employees.

## Outdoor Activities

## Description of Outdoor Activities

Outdoor team building activities provide an opportunity for employees to bond and collaborate in a more relaxed and natural setting. These activities can include hiking, rock climbing, kayaking, and other physical challenges that encourage teamwork and problem-solving. Outdoor activities can be a great way to get employees out of their comfort zones and help them to build strong relationships with each other.

## Examples of Outdoor Activities

Rock Climbing: Teams work together to navigate a rock climbing course, encouraging communication, trust, and collaboration.

Hiking: Teams hike a designated trail and participate in challenges along the way that encourage teamwork and problem-solving.

Kayaking: Teams paddle down a river, working together to navigate rapids and other challenges.

Obstacle Course: Teams compete against each other in an obstacle course, working together to overcome challenges and complete the course.

## Benefits of Outdoor Activities

Improved Physical Fitness: Outdoor activities can provide employees with an opportunity to improve their physical fitness and overall well-being.

Enhanced Communication: Outdoor activities can help employees to build better communication skills and work more cohesively as a team.

Increased Trust: By participating in outdoor activities, employees can build trust and form stronger relationships with each other.

Improved Problem-Solving Skills: Outdoor activities often involve challenges and obstacles that require employees to work together to find solutions, improving their problem-solving skills.

Boosted Morale: Outdoor activities are often fun and engaging, and they can help to improve overall morale and job satisfaction among employees.

Break from the Routine: Outdoor activities provide a break from the daily routine, helping employees to recharge and come back to work feeling refreshed and motivated.

## Indoor Activities

## Description of Indoor Activities

Indoor team building activities provide an opportunity for employees to bond and collaborate in a more controlled and structured environment. These activities can range from problem-solving exercises and games to workshops and training sessions. Indoor activities are often more focused on skill-building and improving teamwork and communication within the workplace.

## Examples of Indoor Activities

Escape Room: Teams work together to solve puzzles and escape a themed room before time runs out.

Cooking Challenge: Teams are given a set of ingredients and must work together to create a meal.

Trivia Contest: Teams compete against each other in a trivia contest, testing their knowledge of various subjects.

Group Art Project: Teams work together to create a large-scale art project, encouraging creativity and collaboration.

## Benefits of Indoor Activities

Improved Communication: Indoor activities can help employees to build better communication skills and work more cohesively as a team.

Enhanced Problem-Solving Skills: Indoor activities often involve challenges and puzzles that require employees to work together to find solutions, improving their problem-solving skills.

Boosted Morale: Indoor activities are often fun and engaging, and they can help to improve overall morale and job satisfaction among employees.

Skill-Building: Indoor activities can provide employees with an opportunity to develop new skills and improve upon existing ones.

Fosters Creativity: Indoor activities, such as group art projects, can encourage creativity and collaboration among employees.

## Problem-solving Activities

## Description of Problem-Solving Activities:

Problem-solving activities are team building activities that are designed to help employees work together to solve a specific challenge or problem. These activities can range from puzzles and brain teasers to more complex team-based challenges that require collaboration and critical thinking skills. The goal of problem-solving activities is to improve teamwork and communication while also providing employees with an opportunity to develop their problem-solving skills.

## Examples of Problem-Solving Activities:

Escape Room: Teams work together to solve puzzles and escape a themed room before time runs out.

Treasure Hunt: Teams follow clues to find a hidden treasure, working together to solve puzzles and complete challenges along the way.

Brain Teasers: Teams are given a series of brain teasers and puzzles to solve, encouraging critical thinking and collaboration.

Scavenger Hunt: Teams compete against each other in a scavenger hunt, searching for items and completing challenges along the way.

## Benefits of Problem-Solving Activities:

Improved Communication: Problem-solving activities can help employees to build better communication skills and work more cohesively as a team.

Enhanced Problem-Solving Skills: Problem-solving activities require employees to work together to find solutions, improving their problem-solving skills.

Boosted Morale: Problem-solving activities are often fun and engaging, and they can help to improve overall morale and job satisfaction among employees.

Encourages Collaboration: Problem-solving activities require employees to work together, encouraging collaboration and teamwork.

Develops Critical Thinking Skills: By solving puzzles and challenges, employees can develop their critical thinking skills and become better problem-solvers.

## Creative Activities

## Description of Creative Activities:

Creative activities are team building activities that encourage employees to think outside the box and tap into their creative side. These activities can range from group art projects and design challenges to writing and performance-based activities. The goal of creative activities is to promote creativity and encourage collaboration among employees while also providing an opportunity for employees to develop their skills and express themselves.

## Examples of Creative Activities:

Group Art Project: Teams work together to create a large-scale art project, encouraging creativity and collaboration.

Design Challenge: Teams are given a design challenge, such as creating a product or developing a marketing campaign, and must work together to come up with creative solutions.

Improv Workshop: Teams participate in an improvisation workshop, encouraging them to think on their feet and work together to create unique and creative scenes.

Writing Workshop: Teams participate in a writing workshop, encouraging them to tap into their creative side and develop their writing skills.

## Benefits of Creative Activities:

Boosts Creativity: Creative activities encourage employees to tap into their creative side, leading to increased creativity and innovation.

Improves Collaboration: By working together on creative projects, employees can improve their collaboration skills and build stronger relationships.

Encourages Skill-Building: Creative activities can provide employees with an opportunity to develop new skills and improve upon existing ones.

Increases Morale: Creative activities are often fun and engaging, and they can help to improve overall morale and job satisfaction among employees.

Promotes Self-Expression: Creative activities give employees an opportunity to express themselves and showcase their talents, leading to increased confidence and self-esteem.

## Summary

Team building activities are an important aspect of building a strong, productive and cohesive team within a workplace. These activities provide opportunities for employees to bond, improve communication, and build stronger relationships with one another. 

They can also help to increase morale and job satisfaction, foster collaboration and teamwork, and develop important skills such as critical thinking and problem-solving. Whether it’s through icebreaker activities, outdoor activities, indoor activities, problem-solving activities, or creative activities, team building activities can have a positive impact on the overall success of a company. 

By investing in team building activities, companies can create a supportive and positive work environment that promotes productivity, creativity, and success.
excerpt: Team building activities play a vital role in promoting a positive work environment and improving the overall success of a company. Whether it’s improving communication, boosting morale, or fostering collaboration, team-building activities have a wide range of benefits for employees.  The objective of this blog is to provide an overview of the importance of team … Read more

title: SEO: 5 Frameworks for Internal Linking
content:
Our startups get 1.5M monthly SEO traffic!

We write quality content & do amazing optimisations. But that's not it.

We also have a solid marketing strategy for link building.

Today I am sharing 5 frameworks we use for internal linking 🧵

— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) March 31, 2022

Our startups get 1.5M monthly SEO traffic!

We write quality content & do amazing optimisations. But that's not it.

We also have a solid marketing strategy for link building.

Today I am sharing 5 frameworks we use for internal linking 🧵

— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) March 31, 2022

Internal links help:

1) Pass on authority between pages

2) Google to crawl your website easily

Plus you have full control on your internal link structure.

The frameworks below will help you lay out an internal linking structure for your website 👇

(2/2)

— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) March 31, 2022

– Helps to identify sub-folders or pages for which you need to build authority

How?

– All pages are organised into well thought out sub-folders
– Every time a new page is to be created, you know exactly which sub-folder it belongs to

(2/4)

— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) March 31, 2022

Eg. your product pages can be at

Homepage → Category → Sub-category → Product.

But your URL can just be /product/<<product-name>>.

This helps you avoid long URLs like /<<category>>/<<sub-category>>/<<product-name>>.

Case Study:https://t.co/R5mqAqbNpA

(4/4)

— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) March 31, 2022

Why?

– Easy interlinking between pages under the same topic

– SEO juice can flow across pages ie if one page gets good authority, the goodness gets passed onto other pages as well

– Helps you get “topical authority” from Google

(2/3)

— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) March 31, 2022

3/ Framework 3: Internal Linking Engine

Adding internal links without a proper structure or a set of rules will have 0 to little impact.

So it’s important you establish guidelines for internal linking that are followed for every page on the website.

(1/3)

— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) March 31, 2022

How?

– Set specific rules along with min/max threshold on number of links

– Sample engine
— Min 2 internal links from pages under the same topic
— Min 3 internal links from other parts of the website

(3/3)

— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) March 31, 2022

Why?

– Other pages on your website get a boost through links from your "power pages"

– It serves as a powerful hack when you want to promote certain pages or sections

(2/5)

— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) March 31, 2022

Identifying power pages:

– Tools like Ahrefs or SEMRush show you page authority & number of domains linking to a page

– Sort all pages on your website by page authority. Top pages in the list are your power pages

(4/5)

— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) March 31, 2022

5/ Framework 5: Audit Engine

A key element of any internal linking strategy is to periodically check for and rectify errors.

Regular SEO audits will give you a good list of points to work on.

(1/3)

— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) March 31, 2022

How?

– Use any SEO tool to do a site audit

– Check for these issues
—  Orphan page
— Broken internal links
— Internal links to redirected pages

– Set a frequency to do these audits & clean errors. Eg. every 2 months.

(3/3)

— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) March 31, 2022
excerpt: SEO is an amazing organic channel to grow your startup. Learn 5 key frameworks to improve internal linking on your website & ace rankings on Google.

title: How to know if a chakra bracelet is real?
content:
Chakra bracelets are a beautiful piece of jewellery which has many spiritual benefits and plays an important role in the spiritual journey. But the key is that the chakra bracelet has to be made of real and high-quality gemstones and how to know if a chakra bracelet is real becomes important.

Currently, in the market, many sellers sell lower-quality versions to cut their costs. This leads to reduced spiritual benefits and the bracelet loses its original properties. Therefore, it is important to have a few checks before you purchase the chakra bracelet. Below is the complete guide which explains how to know if a chakra bracelet is real. Also answering other questions related to chakra bracelets.

Table of Contents

Toggle

• What are chakra bracelets?
• How to know if a chakra bracelet is real?
• Few other ways to know if a chakra bracelet is real
• 1. Real chakra bracelets have 8 different types of beads.
• 2. Uneven holes in the bracelet beads
• 3. Does the chakra bracelet have colour stains
• 4. Order of the stones
• 5. Use nail polish remover

• Understanding the chakras of chakra bracelet
• 1st chakra: Root chakra – Black Tourmaline stone 
• 2nd Chakra: Sacral chakra – Orange Carnelian stone
• 3rd Chakra: Solar plexus chakra – Yellow Citrine stone
• 4th Chakra: Heart chakra – Green Aventurine stone
• 5th Chakra: Throat chakra – Blue Lapis Lazuli stone
• 6th Chakra: Third eye chakra – Indigo Lapis Lazuli
• 7th Chakra: Crown chakra – Clear Quartz Crystal stone

• How do chakra bracelets work?
• What are the benefits of wearing a chakra bracelet? 
• Emotional healing benefits of chakra bracelet
• Physical healing benefits of chakra bracelet 
• Spiritual healing benefits of chakra bracelet 

• How to care for a chakra bracelet?
• How to choose the right chakra bracelet?
• Can you wear more than one chakra bracelet?
• How to use chakra bracelets?
• Meditate with chakra bracelets

• What are other ways of activating chakras?
• 1. Activating chakra bracelet with the help of mantra
• 2. Activating chakra bracelet with the help of sound
• 3. Activating chakra bracelet with the help of light
• 4. Activating chakra bracelet with the help of movement
• 5. Activating chakra bracelet with the help of thoughts

• Which wrist to wear a chakra bracelet

## What are chakra bracelets?

Chakra bracelets are pieces of jewellery that are said to promote balance and well-being by aligning and clearing the chakras, or energy centers of the body. The seven chakra energy centers are located along the spine, from the base to the crown of the head. Each chakra is associated with a different colour and chakra bracelets are often made with colourful beads that correspond to the different chakras. 

There is no scientific evidence to support the claim that chakra bracelets can balance or clear the chakras. However, some people believe that wearing a chakra bracelet may help them to feel more centered and grounded. Some people also find that the colors of the beads can be soothing and calming. 

If you’re interested in trying a chakra bracelet, look for one that is made with high-quality materials and that has beads that are the colours of the chakras. You may also want to choose a bracelet that has a meaning or story that resonates with you. 

Charka bracelets have become very famous and are now found in abundance. This has led to sellers selling low-quality bracelets, hence it is important to check the authenticity of the chakra before buying them. Read on to know how to know if a chakra bracelet is real.

## How to know if a chakra bracelet is real?

​​There are many ways to tell if a chakra bracelet is real or not. One way is to look for a stamp of approval from a reputable organisation, such as the Better Business Bureau. Another way is to check the materials used to make the bracelet. Most real chakra bracelets will be made from natural stones, like quartz or amethyst. Below are other important checks to know if a chakra bracelet is real

1. Inspect the bracelet for any signs of damage or wear and tear. A real chakra bracelet should be in good condition with no visible signs of damage. 

2. Check that the bracelet is made of natural materials. A real chakra bracelet will usually be made of crystals, stones or beads. 

3. Ask the seller if the bracelet has been cleansed and charged. A real chakra bracelet will have been cleansed and charged with positive energy before being sold. 

4. Test the bracelet by wearing it for a period of time. A real chakra bracelet should help to balance and align your chakras.

## Few other ways to know if a chakra bracelet is real

## 1. Real chakra bracelets have 8 different types of beads.

Most part of the chakra bracelet is made with black beads and the rest of them with red, orange, white or purple, yellow, green and indigo make up for the remaining 25%. If the bracelet is missing any of these colours and has a different colour, it is most likely to be a fake one. 

Many artisans make this bracelet with other precious stones or gemstones but again, these may not be the real chakra bracelets. The most important thing is that the real chakra bracelet has to be made with high-quality precious stones. 

## 2. Uneven holes in the bracelet beads

Hold the chakra bracelet in your hands and look at the holes that are drilled in the beads. Do the holes and the edges look smooth? Or are they slightly uneven?

If the holes are uneven then it is likely to be a real chakra bracelet. If it is smooth, it means the beads are made of plastic or some other material that is easy to drill. 

The real chakra bracelet is made of precious stones that are not very easy to drill. This causes the hole edges to become uneven and rough. 

## 3. Does the chakra bracelet have colour stains

Hold the chakra bracelet in your hand and pull the beads apart to see the string. If you find colour on the string, the bracelet is likely to be fake. This means the bracelet has been painted. Most of the chakra bracelets have white-coloured strings but many use other colours as well. Whatever may be the case, do check for the colours on the strings.

## 4. Order of the stones

The order of the beads in the chakra bracelet has to be in the order of the rainbow colours. Red, orange, yellow, green, blue and indigo followed by purple. 

## 5. Use nail polish remover

Use a cotton swab and rub it on the beads. If the swab picks the colour, the chakra bracelet is likely to be a fake one. Which means it has been coloured and is not authentic. 

## Understanding the chakras of chakra bracelet

The seven chakras are the root chakra, the sacral chakra, the solar plexus chakra, the heart chakra, the throat chakra, the third eye chakra, and the crown chakra. Each chakra is associated with a different colour, and chakra bracelets are often made with colourful beads that correspond to the different chakras.

## 1st chakra: Root chakra – Black Tourmaline stone 

The root chakra is located at the base of the spine. It is associated with the colour red and is said to represent grounding, security, and survival. The colour black also represents the transformation in the root chakra. 

It is a colour of new beginnings, letting go of the past, and moving forward into the future. Black tourmaline stone is associated with the root chakra. It is a protective stone that grounds and balances the energy in the body. It helps to release fear and anxiety and promotes a sense of safety and security.

Zircon, Smoky Quartz, Garnet, Red Zincite are some other crystals related to the root chakra.

## 2nd Chakra: Sacral chakra – Orange Carnelian stone

The Sacral Chakra, or Svadhisthana, is located just below the navel. It is associated with pleasure, sexuality, and creativity. When this chakra is balanced, we feel pleasure in our lives and are able to create and enjoy new experiences. When it is imbalanced, we may feel blocked creatively or sexually and may experience pain or numbness in the lower abdomen or pelvis.

## 3rd Chakra: Solar plexus chakra – Yellow Citrine stone

The solar plexus chakra is located just above the navel, in the area of the solar plexus. This chakra is associated with the element of fire, and the associated qualities include a will, power, and determination. The solar plexus chakra is responsible for our personal power, and our ability to take action and make decisions. When this chakra is in balance, we feel confident and self-assured, and we are able to assert our own power and authority. 

When the solar plexus chakra is out of balance, we may feel powerless, or we may have difficulty making decisions. We may also feel disconnected from our personal power, and our ability to take action. The colour of this chakra is yellow. 

Yellow colour is associated with the sun, and with the element of fire. When worn as jewellery it helps with motivation and willpower. Those who are seeking to increase their personal power, or to find their purpose in life, may benefit from wearing solar plexus chakra jewellery. 

## 4th Chakra: Heart chakra – Green Aventurine stone

The heart chakra, or Anahata, is the fourth chakra. It is situated in the center of the chest and is associated with the element of air. The heart chakra is the chakra of love, compassion, and forgiveness. Its energy is expansive and open, and it is through this chakra that we connect with others and the world around us. 

When the heart chakra is balanced, we feel compassion and love for ourselves and others, and we are able to forgive. When it is out of balance, we may feel closed off, judgmental, and resentful. The colour associated with the heart chakra is green. 

The green stone within your chakra bracelet is present to promote and encourage a healthy balance of the heart chakra. If you are having trouble with your heart chakra, try meditating with green stones, such as jade, emerald, or green tourmaline.

## 5th Chakra: Throat chakra – Blue Lapis Lazuli stone

The Throat Chakra is located in the center of the neck at the level of the throat. It is associated with the element of sound and the sense of hearing. The Throat Chakra is responsible for communication, both verbal and non-verbal. 

This chakra allows us to express our thoughts and feelings, as well as to listen to others. When the Throat Chakra is balanced, we are able to communicate clearly and assertively. We can also be good listeners, and we have a strong inner voice. 

When the Throat Chakra is imbalanced, we may have difficulty communicating our needs, and we may find it hard to express our feelings. We may also have difficulty hearing others, and we may be prone to gossip. 

The colour blue is associated with the throat chakra. The colour blue relates to self-expression and communication. Lapis lazuli, when worn as jewellery, is often thought to promote self-awareness, courage and truth. 

There is a strong connection between this stone and the throat chakra. It is said to help open the chakra and encourage self-expression. Once you start using it, you may notice that it becomes easier for you to communicate your thoughts and feelings.

## 6th Chakra: Third eye chakra – Indigo Lapis Lazuli

The third eye chakra is located in the center of the forehead. It is associated with the element of ether and is considered to be the center of psychic power. The third eye chakra is responsible for psychic ability, intuition, and visualisation. it is also related to our imagination and intellect. 

The colour indigo connects us to our wisdom and intuition within the third eye chakra. wearing this stone can help to open and balance the third eye chakra. 

## 7th Chakra: Crown chakra – Clear Quartz Crystal stone

The crown chakra, or Sahasrara, is the seventh chakra. It is located at the top of the head. The crown chakra is associated with enlightenment, spiritual connection, and cosmic consciousness.

The colour of the crown chakra is violet or white. The crown chakra is located at the very top of the head. It is responsible for spirituality and connection to the universe.

The crown chakra is often represented by a lotus flower with one thousand petals. The lotus flower is a symbol of purity and enlightenment.

The crown chakra is associated with the element of ether. Ether is the fifth element and is the highest form of matter. It is the essence of all things and is the source of all energy.

The crown chakra is also associated with the planet Jupiter. Jupiter is the largest planet in our solar system and is known as the planet of luck and expansion.

The crown chakra is the most spiritual of all the chakras. It is the connection between the physical and the spiritual. When the crown chakra is balanced, we feel connected to our higher selves and to the universe. We feel a sense of oneness with all that is.

## How do chakra bracelets work?

The idea behind chakra bracelets is that they can help to balance the chakras, or energy centers, in the body. Each of the seven chakras is associated with a different colour, and each colour is said to correspond to a different type of energy. 

Wearing a bracelet with all seven colours is thought to help keep the chakras in balance. Many people feel more balanced and centred after wearing the chakra bracelet.

## What are the benefits of wearing a chakra bracelet? 

## Emotional healing benefits of chakra bracelet

There are many benefits to wearing a chakra bracelet. One of the most important benefits is that it can help to heal emotional wounds. Emotional wounds can be very deep and difficult to heal. A chakra bracelet can help to open up the chakras and allow the healing process to begin. Another benefit of wearing a chakra bracelet is that it can help to balance the chakras. 

When the chakras are out of balance, it can lead to physical and emotional problems. Wearing a chakra bracelet can help to keep the chakras balanced and in alignment. Finally, wearing a chakra bracelet can also help to protect the wearer from negative energy. 

Negative energy can be very harmful and can cause a lot of damage to the body and mind. Wearing a chakra bracelet can help to shield the wearer from negative energy and allow them to stay positive and focused.

## Physical healing benefits of chakra bracelet 

There are many benefits that a chakra bracelet can bring to your physical health. It can help to improve your circulation, increase your energy levels, and reduce stress. It can also help to relieve pain and improve your overall well-being.

## Spiritual healing benefits of chakra bracelet 

The chakra bracelet is said to be beneficial for providing spiritual healing. It is said to be helpful in restoring balance and harmony within the body and mind. It is also said to be helpful in relieving stress and anxiety. It provides protection from negative energy and helps to clear the chakras.

## How to care for a chakra bracelet?

When not in use, store your chakra bracelet in a clean, dry place. If possible, keep it in a pouch or wrapped in a soft cloth to protect it from dirt and debris. When you are ready to wear your bracelet, simply tie it around your wrist.

1. Take off your bracelet before going to bed. 

2. When not wearing, store your bracelet in a dry and safe place. 

3. Cleanse your bracelet regularly with sage or palo santo. 

4. Avoid getting your bracelet wet.

## How to choose the right chakra bracelet?

There are many factors to consider when choosing the right chakra bracelet. 

The first is to identify the type of bracelet you need. There are many different types of chakra bracelets available, each with their own unique benefits. 

The second factor to consider is your personal preference. There are many different styles of chakra bracelets available, so it is important to find one that you feel comfortable wearing. 

The third factor to consider is the size of the bracelet. Chakra bracelets come in a variety of sizes, so it is important to find one that fits comfortably around your wrist. 

The fourth factor to consider is the material of the bracelet. Chakra bracelets are made from a variety of materials, so it is important to find one that is made from a material that you are comfortable with. 

The fifth factor to consider is the price of the bracelet. Chakra bracelets can range in price from a few dollars to a few hundred dollars. It is important to find a bracelet that is affordable for you.

## Can you wear more than one chakra bracelet?

There is no definitive answer, as it depends on personal preference. Some people may feel that wearing multiple chakra bracelets can be helpful in promoting balance and harmony, while others may prefer to wear just one or two. Ultimately, it is up to the individual to decide what feels right for them.

## How to use chakra bracelets?

There are many ways to use a chakra bracelet. The most common way is to wear it on your wrist. You can also hold it in your hand during meditation or place it on your body during a massage.

## Meditate with chakra bracelets

1. Choose the right chakra bracelet for your needs. There are many different types of chakra bracelets available, each with different stones and colors associated with different chakras. Consider what you hope to achieve by wearing a chakra bracelet, and select one that will help you to achieve your goals.

2. Cleanse your chakra bracelet. Before you begin, it is important to cleanse your chakra bracelet of any negative energy. You can do this by holding it under running water, or by using a crystal singing bowl. 

3. Find a comfortable place to sit or lie down. Once you have cleansed your chakra bracelet, find a comfortable place to sit or lie down. Make sure you will not be interrupted for the next few minutes. 

4. Hold your chakra bracelet in your hands. Take a few deep breaths and focus your attention on your chakra bracelet. Visualise each of the stones or colors associated with the chakras, starting at the root chakra and moving up to the crown chakra. 

5. Repeat a mantra or affirmation. As you visualise the stones or colours, repeat a mantra or affirmation that resonates with you. For example, you might say, “I am grounded and centered.” 

6. Continue for 5-10 minutes. Continue repeating your mantra or affirmation and visualising the stones or colors for 5-10 minutes. When you are finished, take a few deep breaths and slowly open your eyes.

## What are other ways of activating chakras?

## 1. Activating chakra bracelet with the help of mantra

There are many ways to activate your chakra bracelet with the help of mantra. One of the most common ways is to recite the mantra while holding your bracelet in your hand. You can also recite the mantra while wearing your bracelet.

## 2. Activating chakra bracelet with the help of sound

Another way to activate your chakra bracelet is by using sound. You can use a sound machine or a sound player to play the sound of your mantra. You can also use your own voice to recite the mantra.

## 3. Activating chakra bracelet with the help of light

Light is also a very effective way to activate your chakra bracelet. You can use a lightbox or a light bulb to shine a light on your bracelet. You can also use a flashlight to shine a light on your bracelet.

## 4. Activating chakra bracelet with the help of movement

Movement is also a very effective way to activate your chakra bracelet. You can use your hands to move your bracelet. You can also use your feet to move your bracelet.

## 5. Activating chakra bracelet with the help of thoughts

Thoughts are also a very effective way to activate your chakra bracelet. You can use your thoughts to focus on your bracelet. You can also use your thoughts to control your bracelet.

## Which wrist to wear a chakra bracelet

Many people who buy chakra bracelets do not realise that the wrist in which they wear the chakra impacts the benefits they get. The benefits of wearing a chakra bracelet on the dominant hand are different from the benefits of wearing it on the non-dominant hand. 

The dominant hand is the hand that is used most often for writing and other tasks. It is controlled by the brain’s left hemisphere, which is associated with logic and analytical thought. The non-dominant hand is controlled by the brain’s right hemisphere, which is associated with creativity and intuition.

When a chakra bracelet is worn on the dominant hand, it is said to help the wearer focus on their goals and achieve them. It is also said to help the wearer to think more clearly and make better decisions. 

When a chakra bracelet is worn on the non-dominant hand, it is said to help the wearer to connect with their intuition and creativity. It is also said to help the wearer to relax and to reduce stress.

## About Aura Quartz

This new crystal is made using electrostatic bonding where Quartz binds with other minerals like platinum, silver, gold or other rare minerals. 

Aura Quartz retains the healing properties of its original crystal Quartz and additionally absorbs the properties of the new mineral. Aura Quartz healing properties have dominance of clear quartz. However, each individual crystal has its own property due to the combination of minerals that gives each one of them a unique healing property. This crystal has been widely approved and used by spiritual practitioners and healers.

This makes it a powerful crystal as regulating body energy can help tackle any condition of the body. Aura Quartz boosts the life force energy of our body. 

Aura Quartz is believed to assist in treating a few organs like the liver and pancreas. It helps increase oxygen in our body and improve the overall immune system. This crystal is also used to cleanse the inner organs of the body and purify them.

All our experiences, good or bad, are stored in cells of our body, also known as cellular memory. When Aura Quartz crystals are used for healing, they help in releasing the traumatic and unwanted memories from these cells that were causing self-doubt, fear etc. This helps in clearing the past and gives the required push to start life afresh.

## Spiritual healing properties of Aura Quartz

Aura Quartz is often used by practitioners as the crystal of spiritual transformation. The high-frequency vibrations that it inhibits enable one to connect with the higher spiritual realms. Aura Quartz widens the consciousness and opens doors into the angelic realm. It connects one to the higher spiritual self which also awakens psychic abilities. This crystal helps in cleansing the aura by removing negative energy and strengthening it. 

When one begins their spiritual journey, they are likely to face hindrances in multiple forms. The presence of Aqua Quartz in this process will ease the journey and help in removing challenges. By channelling the thoughts and consciousness in one direction and eliminating negativity, makes the spiritual journey calming and soothing. 

## Aura Quartz healing properties and chakra connection

Aura Quartz possesses high vibrations and energy that can be felt by anyone coming in contact with the crystal. These crystals have the potential to unblock and align all seven chakras of the human body. However, Aura Quartz resonates the most with the heart chakra. 

The heart chakra is the center of empathy, love and forgiveness acting as a bridge between earth and the spirit. With Aura Quartz, the heart chakra remains unblocked and aligned which helps in gaining trust, peace and courage. 

## Types of Aura Quartz and their healing properties

Angel Aura Quartz is a magical crystal that is formed with a combination of platinum or silver with quartz. This dreamy crystal has a reflective appearance. When placed under light, it captures all colours of the rainbow and reflects them back giving an angelic aura. 

The name of this crystal comes from the fact that its appearance resembles the wing of a beautiful angel, sparkling with light and captivating beauty. Aqua Aura Quartz is a vibrant crystal made with a combination of gold and Clear Quartz. This is a calming stone and is used by healers to release stress and negativity. Sunshine Aura Quartz is made by combining clear Quartz with gold and platinum. This is a vibrant yellow crystal with a beaming shimmer. title: How to tell if Black Tourmaline is real?
content:
One of the easiest ways to tell if Black Tourmaline is real or not is to do a scratch test with a knife. A real Black Tourmaline will be too hard to scratch.

Black Tourmaline is a very hard gemstone. It ranges between 7 to 7.5 on Moh’s hardness scale. Thus making it an incredibly hard crystal. A simple scratch test with a knife will identify its authenticity. 

You can also look for the usual physical appearance of Black Tourmaline to identify its authenticity like smoothness, texture, edges etc.

The ultimate test can be taking the stone to a gemologist. They can give you more details about Black Tourmaline and its authenticity.   

This guide covers A-Z information about Black Tourmaline. How to tell if Black Tourmaline is real or fake, its properties, where and how to use them. Read on!

## Complete A-Z guide to Black Tourmaline meaning, healing properties & uses

## What is Black Tourmaline

Black Tourmaline belongs to the Tourmaline family which is a crystalline boron silicate mineral. Also known as schorl, Black Tourmaline is one of the tourmalines that’s found in abundance and is affordable as well. These amount to almost 95% of all the naturally found tourmalines. That’s how commonly they are found!

Black Tourmaline is a silicate mineral that has boron. It also has high levels of iron in it and magnetic properties as well. These are categorised under semi-precious stones as they are available in plenty and don’t cost you a lot.

Gemstones of the Tourmaline family contain minerals like iron, magnesium, sodium or boron.

 Black Tourmaline is found in multiple varieties and colours.  

Zodiac SignScorpio, Libra, CapricornEnergy ColourBlack – Colour of the UniverseHardness7-7.5ChakraRoot Chakra & Earth star chakra

## Black Tourmaline Meaning

A Powerful inky black stone that will act as a protective shield and is a symbol of strength. Black Tourmaline is a dark-coloured stone with powerful grounding energies that absorbs all the negative energy from you. It helps get rid of the dark emotions and anxiousness and convert them to positive vibrations.

Black Tourmaline is connected to the root chakra, that keeps you grounded and centred. Black Tourmaline meaning can be summarised as follows

• A protective shield from dark vibrations
• Strong grounding energies
• Connected to base chakras – Keeps you balanced & grounded
• Self-confidence enhancer
• Enhances motivation

## How to tell if Black Tourmaline is real or fake

## How to identify a real Black Tourmaline by its appearance

The ultimate & sure shot way of knowing if the Black Tourmaline is authentic is or not is by verifying it with a gemologist. However, you can also do some simple checks at your end. 

Following are some properties of the black stone that you can check by looking at it to tell if Black Tourmaline is real or not.

By Lustre of Black Tourmaline

When a Black Tourmaline is brought under light, it radiates the light back in a way that gives a glaze finish to the surface of Black Tourmaline. You will notice that Black Tourmaline stone has a lustrous and glass finish. The fake ones can be identified by looking at their surface. If they have a metallic or matte glaze on them, then they are likely to be a fake black crystals.

By Inclusions in Black Tourmaline

During formation of a mineral, if one mineral gets trapped inside of another one, it is termed as inclusions. 

These inclusions are visible to naked eyes. You may see a different colour of that mineral or a differently sized or a differently textured mineral stuck to it.  

In the case of Black Tourmaline, iron is the inclusion. You will notice a red-coloured mineral on the stone’s surface, this is the iron as inclusion. This iron also gets rusted when exposed to the moisture in the air. Hence, this inclusion will indicate the authenticity of Black Tourmaline.

Typical appearance and structure of Black Tourmaline

Tourmaline crystals have round and smooth edges. They are narrow and resemble a pencil in length and shape and taper at the ends.

The cross-sections of tourmaline are six-sided, hexagonal or triangular in structure. Hold the crystal in your hands and observe it from top to bottom. If you see any other shape, it is likely to be some other crystal. 

Tourmalines should have long grooved lines on their surface. These lines are called striations. Hold the crystal in your hands and observe closely. You should be able to find thin lines running lengthwise. These lines are easily visible to naked eyes and should not require a hand lens.

## How to tell if Black Tourmaline is real 

Performing a simple scratch test with a knife can do the work. If scratching the stone with a knife leaves a mark on your stone, then what you are holding is probably not a Black Tourmaline. 

Make sure your knife is sharp and run the knife over the stone a couple of times.

This is the most commonly used method and is based on the hardness of Black Tourmaline and the knife. The hardness of Black Tourmaline is 7 whereas that of a knife is around 5. 

Hence a scratch with a steel blade knife on your stone can suggest the stone is fake.

## Black Tourmaline healing properties

Black Tourmaline is one of those stones that possess emotional, physical and spiritual healing properties. Though it’s an easily available crystal, it is a must to have stone among crystal lovers. You may also call Black Tourmaline an all-rounder when it comes to healing properties!

Image by flick.com

## Physical healing properties of Black Tourmaline

• Absorbs harmful radiations from electronic items around you
• Improves your body’s blood circulation
• Detoxification from pollution around you
• Enhances body’s stamina
• Aids in weight loss
• Reduces bloating effect and constipation
• Improves immune system
• Strengthens reflex points of lower limbs
• Known to act as a mild painkiller for arthritis
• Enhances the effect of medicines of joint pains, numbness in body parts and muscle tear
• Better coordination between left and right brain
• Helps in reducing stress

Black Tourmaline is a powerful stone that has multiple physical benefits as mentioned above. Many Reiki practitioners use this stone in different ways to maximise its benefits. It’s an excellent stone to heal your physical body by reducing stress. 

Stress is known to be the mother of all diseases. It can cause an increase in blood pressure, body aches, stomach troubles etc. Having a Black Tourmaline around you can help get rid of these.

## Emotional healing properties of Black Tourmaline

• Enhances self confidence 
• Evokes clarity in mind
• Improves focus and concentration
• Selfless attitude
• Releases anger
• Makes you think creatively 

Black Tourmaline keeps your emotions balanced. It is known as the shield protecting you from negative thoughts and the toxic environment. Those suffering from nervousness, anxiety and restlessness should definitely keep this crystal around. 

It has a strong effect in getting rid of these and bringing the right balance in your mind. 

Filtering out the negative thoughts and filling it with positive, self confidence and creative thoughts. Feeling lazy, sleepy and depressed throughout the day can be eradicated by usage of black tourmaline. You stay in a healthy, energetic and happy mood all through the day. 

## Spiritual healing properties of Black Tourmaline

• Activates root chakra
• Builds deep bond between you and mother earth
• Keeps you grounded
• As a cleaner, cleanses all negative thoughts
• Transforms negative & evil energies to positive ones
• Enhances and expedites your spiritual journey 

In the spiritual world, Black Tourmaline is known as the guard to your entrance. It stands as a protective shield that will block all kinds of negative energies. 

Black Tourmaline activates your base chakra, also known as the root chakra. The Root chakra is known for connecting you to mother earth, hence keeping you grounded and closer to earth’s energies. 

When black tourmaline establishes the connection and activates your root chakra, you experience a sense of liberation and freedom. There is an internal power that generates within you and gives you that self-confidence to go out in the world and deal with problems positively.

Black Tourmaline is known to transform energies. It can change the energies and convert them in a way that serves you positively. As your gatekeeper, Black Tourmaline will convert all the negative energy around you to positive. 

Keeps you protected from negative people and the negative aura around you. The positive energy clears all the evil and negative blockages from your surroundings.

## Black Tourmaline and Chakra Connection

• Associated with root chakra & Earth star chakra
• Keeps you grounded
• Provides stability
• Gives a sense of safety
• Maintains overall wellbeing

## Black Tourmaline is associated with the root chakra

The base chakra, also known as root chakra when aligned with our body keeps us grounded. It is located at the bottom of the spine. Whatever it may be that is basic for you, be it clothes, food or shelter, root chakra helps in maintaining its stability. Once this happens, you naturally start feeling safe as well.

Black tourmaline helps in activating root chakra and keeping it unblocked. If the root chakra is blocked, it may impact other chakras of the body too. This is because the root chakra provides energy to other chakras. 

Hence Black Tourmaline can play a major role in keeping root chakra and other chakras activated.

## Black Tourmaline also connects with the earth star chakra

Earth star chakra is not present in the physical body. It is located almost twelve inches below the feet. This chakra connects you to earthly energies. While root chakra also works in a similar way, the earth star chakra is the “super root” chakra that connects your energy to the earth’s and universe’s energies.

When Black tourmaline aligns with the root chakra and earth star chakra, it brings a feeling of stability, healthy body, mental peace and a grounding effect. You will begin to feel content with yourself. 

## How to use Black Tourmaline for maximum benefits

## Use Black Tourmaline at Home

Black tourmaline is your gatekeeper keeping negative and evil energies away from you. Having this crystal at your home will ensure your home is shielded and filled with only positive energies.

You can place it near the entrance, living area or workplace. Wherever you spend most of your time, place it closer to that place.

## Use Black Tourmaline while Sleeping

Detoxing before sleep and having a peaceful sleep is very crucial. Black Tourmaline is one of those crystals that aid with this. 

You may place black tourmaline under your pillow or mattress. It can also be placed at the bedside. This will give you a feeling of protection and safety. Will help you release all the worries before you fall asleep. Next morning, you will wake up fresh after a sound sleep.

## Use Black Tourmaline at Work

Part of our stress comes from our work. In fact, most of it comes from work! It is important one is able to handle it well by also maintaining calm. Keeping a black tourmaline at your workplace will help you in reducing the stress and keeping your emotions in check. 

The feeling of low self-confidence or not being able to make that mark at your workplace is felt often. Having this crystal around can work wonders in this regard.

## Use Black Tourmaline as jewellery

Wearing Black Tourmaline in the form of jewellery can be one of the best ways to use it. This way it will stay closer to your body all the time. It will act as a protective cloak wherever you go. Wearing this crystal as jewellery will ensure you are protected from all kinds of negativity. You will feel a sense of safety in its presence. 

You can use it as a pendant, ring, bracelet or even earrings. 

## Use Black Tourmaline during meditation

Place the black tourmaline on your palm and hold it. Alternatively, you can also place it in your meditation area. This will help in clearing the aura.

You need a clear and peaceful mind while meditating. Having black tourmaline around you while meditating will create this environment for you. Meditating with this crystal will connect you to your base, enhance grounding effects and establish a connection with higher positive energies. 

It wipes out all the negative thoughts and clears your aura. It makes your meditation and spiritual journey clean, bright and peaceful. 

## How to cleanse and recharge Black Tourmaline

Black Tourmaline which acts as your gatekeeper, absorbs all the negative energies. This crystal needs to be cleansed frequently so that it can function properly and emit positive energies by eliminating negative ones. 

There are many ways to cleanse and recharge your stone, following are the key methods

## Using Water to cleanse Black Tourmaline

Black Tourmaline ranges between 7-7.5 on the hardness scale. This means water will not affect it negatively. Water is known for neutralising the energies and bringing them back to earth. You can soak black tourmaline in water for about 24hrs. This will cleanse it completely. 

## Using Selenite to cleanse Black Tourmaline

Place Black tourmaline on top of selenite bringing them in direct contact with each other. This way it can absorb all the energy. You may place the crystals in this position for 12 hours. 

Selenite is known for its calmness and clarity. Many other crystals are cleansed using selenite. Alternatively, you may also use clear quartz if you do not have selenite. 

## Using sunlight to cleanse Black Tourmaline

Sunlight is a great source to cleanse your crystal. However, make sure you do not expose black tourmaline to direct sunlight for a longer duration. It may cause harmful effects to the stone. Place the stone in morning sunlight when the intensity is lesser and remove it before sunlight becomes harsh. 

## Using Moonlight to cleanse Black Tourmaline

Moonlight is the safest to cleanse your stone. You may place your stone outside your house where it gets direct moonlight or places it on the window side. Keep the stone under moonlight overnight. You may collect it before sunrise. Your stone is now ready to use. 

## Restore and recharge Black Tourmaline in following ways

• Place it in running water. Combine this process with positive affirmations. This will help the stone connect with motherly earth as well and you will feel alive as well during this meditation process.
• You may use soil to recharge it. Bury black tourmaline under soil for some time. This will recharge it completely.

Interested in learning about other crystals? Read about the Chakra bracelet and find out steps to identify the authenticity

title: SEO Strategy for Startups: A 30-step guide!
content:
My startups get 750K/month organic traffic and SEO has been a major reason for our growth to $3 million+ revenue.

I honestly can't imagine a startup marketing plan that doesn't have SEO focus.

So here's my 30-step SEO strategy for startups based on 4 years of learnings 🧵

— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

2/ Define your SEO goals

Be clear on what exactly you want — overall website traffic, brand awareness, purchases or something else. All your SEO efforts must be aligned to the goals you set.

[Right mindset]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

4/ Allocate time & money for SEO

SEO is a long-term strategy. So budget time & money for SEO upfront.

This will also help decide if you will be using paid or free tools, do content in-house or hire content writers etc.

[Right mindset]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

6/ Define metrics & create a measurement system

– Set up Google Analytics & Search Console
– Decide the metrics you want to track (ex. pageviews, # of pages in top 100 etc.)
– Create a routine to regularly update & monitor the data

[Correct Setup]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

8/ If you can, pick your domain name wisely.

For ex. our domain is https://t.co/rKN1S3MDFl and ranks #1 for the competitive keyword "remote tools".

[Correct Setup]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

10/ Optimise your website's page speed.

Go a step further & optimise your core web vitals too.

[Correct Setup]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

12/ Writing guest posts is the best way to increase your website's authority 

Set up a process to:
– Research opportunities
– Automate outreach
– Create outlines
– Write content

[Website Authority]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

14/ People will link to you only if you have quality content.

Publish guides & in-depth content on your website and reach out to others asking to link to your content.

[Website Authority]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

16/ Come up with seed keywords

These are keywords, topics or even broad themes you already know or have read about.

Just jog your memory and list down all keywords you can remember.

[Keyword Research]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

18/ Use a keyword research tool to get a more extensive list

I've used @ahrefss & @semrush – love both of them.

– Enter your seed keywords in keyword explorer
– Ahrefs: "phrase match", "having same terms"
– SEMRush: "keyword variations", "related keywords"

[Keyword Research]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

20/ Filter keywords for low difficulty

Every keyword research tool will have a keyword difficulty (KD) score. Filter your list by a low KD, say 20.

KD is only a heuristic & helps you get an initial list. You have to do manual work to filter the list further.

[Keyword Research]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

22/ Your goal should always be to kick out at least one of the existing top 10 results.

Make sure you have >1-2 results that have a lower authority than you and/or have poor quality content.

[Keyword Research]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

24/ Optimise your content for the reader, not just for keywords.

Google also actively tracks this by measuring factors like time spent by users on your page.

[Content Creation]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

26/ Research your competitors for content & keyword ideas.

Don't hesitate to even borrow their SEO strategy.

[Content Creation]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

28/ No orphan links.

As a rule of thumb, each page on your website should have at least 1 internal link.

[Optimisations]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021

30/ Update & optimise your old content regularly.

You don't want your competitors to outrank you just by including latest updates.

[Optimisations]— Hrishikesh Pardeshi (@hrishiptweets) September 8, 2021
excerpt: We’ve grown from 0 to 1.5/month organic visitors. Here’s my 30-step SEO strategy for startups.

title: Write for Us: Lifestyle, Travel, Fashion, Jewellery, Gemstones & More
content:
Submit a high quality guest post and write for us on Lifestyle, Travel, Jewellery, Gemstones & related domains. Read on to know more about how to submit a guest post on Writer Alpha.

Writer Alpha is an information hub for gemstones, business, startups & technology. Are you interested to write a guest post for us?

We accept guest posts from startup founders, working professionals, bloggers & thought leaders. Our guidelines will help you understand what to expect and how to get published on Writer Alpha.

## Guidelines for guest post on Writer Alpha

• Please ensure that your article is grammatically correct, easy to read, and flows smoothly.
• Additionally, it is important that your content is completely original and not previously published.
• Ensure that all data, references, and quotes are properly attributed.
• Finally, if you include a link to your website or content, it should be placed at the end of the article and not be overly promotional. Please note that links at the beginning of the article will be removed.

## How to submit your guest post pitch?

To submit your pitch or to inquire about getting published, please send your guest post pitch to hrishikesh@flexiple.com. Please use “Guest Post: Writer Alpha” as the subject line of your email.

## Formatting guidelines

• To ensure your article meets the guidelines, please ensure it contains at least 1000 words and includes appropriate headings (H2, H3) for subheadings.
• To improve readability, use simple sentences and keep paragraphs to no more than 4 to 6 sentences.
• Additionally, please keep sub-sections concise and under 400 words.
• Aim to use plain language without jargon, buzzwords, or unnecessary filler words to make the content easily understandable.
• Utilize bullet points where possible to break up dense text.
• Finally, make sure to include alt text and sources for all images you use.

## Guest post topics

Our content focuses on specific topics to ensure it is relevant to our readers. If you wish to contribute a guest post, we welcome submissions on the following subjects:

• Gemstones
• Startups
• Business
• Entrepreneurship
• SEO
• Email Marketing
• Content Marketing
• Social Media Marketing
• Digital Marketing
• Conversion Optimization
• Productivity
• Web Design
• Web Development
• Blogging

## Review process for guest posts

• We aim to respond to your guest post pitch within 3-5 business days to inform you of our decision and the next steps.
• If we proceed with your pitch/article, we will provide guidance on any necessary changes or iterations.
• Please note that we reserve the right to reject or modify your submission as needed.
• If we publish your article, you agree not to publish it elsewhere, including your own blog or website.
• However, if we do not proceed with your article, we relinquish all rights to it, and you are free to publish or use it as you wish.

## How to search for us on Google?

The following keywords or search phrases are commonly used to find us on Google:

• Gemstones + Guest Post
• Startups + Guest Post
• Business + Guest Post
• Entrepreneurship + Guest Post
• SEO + Guest Post
• Email Marketing + Guest Post
• Content Marketing + Guest Post
